
### inferring cache accesses: shortcut  {.smaller}


```
char *array;
posix_memalign(&array, CACHE_SIZE, CACHE_SIZE);
array[index] = 1;
if (mystery) {
    *pointer = 1;
}
if (TimeAccessTo(&array[index]) > THRESHOLD) {
    /* pointer accessed */
}

```
 

* if looking for <code>array[index]</code> to be evicted, don't need others loaded
